calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considered the declaration of Ernest Knowles in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Wesa, Inc. dba Weaver Saunders Buick-Pontiac-Cadillac, William A. Weaver, Jr., and James L. Saunders as follows:
Principal $33,450.11
Prejudgment Interest $702.84
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $710.00, for a total of $37,362.95
Judgment signed in open court.
